onboarding.title: Good food goes to waste
onboarding.subtitle: Every day, restaurants throw away perfectly good food. It doesn't have to be this way.

onboarding.title: Share it with your community
onboarding.subtitle: Buy surplus food from your favorite restaurants at a reduced price. Win for you, win for them.

onboarding.title: Donate and make an impact
onboarding.subtitle: Support verified local charities. Your contribution feeds someone in need — with full trust.

onboarding.title: Join the community
onboarding.subtitle: Buyers, sellers, and charities working together to reduce food waste.
